name: maestro
description: Tech-lead orchestration for Claude Code. The expensive model decides, the cheap models type.

plugins.name: maestro
plugins.description: Turns your top-tier model into a tech lead: it keeps decomposition, architecture and final synthesis, delegating lookups to a Haiku scout, mechanical work to a Sonnet fast-worker and long investigations to a read-only deep-reasoner (Sonnet by default, Opus on demand).
